message:
🐛 Fix CodeQL findings: stack trace exposure and prototype pollution (#2477)

- Remove error message details from Netlify function responses (analytics-collect,
  umami-collect, analytics-dashboard) — log server-side, return generic messages
- Prevent prototype pollution in PodDrillDown label/annotation parsing by
  rejecting __proto__/constructor/prototype keys and using Object.create(null)
- Apply same protection to SecretDrillDown base64 decoding

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
